---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: 'feat: <short description of the feature>'
labels: ['enhancement', 'needs-triage']
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

<!-- Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe it.
     e.g., "I'm always frustrated when..." or "It is currently not possible to..." -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.
     Why is this proposal better? -->

## Use Cases

<!-- Describe concrete scenarios where this feature would be useful.
     Who benefits and how? -->

## Acceptance Criteria

<!-- What does "done" look like for this feature? List measurable outcomes. -->

- [ ] ...
- [ ] ...

## Additional Context

<!-- Add any other context, mockups, diagrams, or examples here. -->

## Impact Assessment

| Area | Impact |
|---|---|
| Breaking change? | Yes / No |
| Documentation needed? | Yes / No |
| New dependencies? | Yes / No |
| Performance implications? | Yes / No |

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to ensure this is not a duplicate.
- [ ] I have clearly described the problem this feature solves.
- [ ] I have described the proposed solution.
- [ ] I have considered alternatives.
